mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, account_number, amount, merchant_name, approval_no, year, month, day, status, transacted_at FROM expense WHERE approval_no = #{approvalNo}

SELECT id, user_id, account_number, amount, merchant_name, approval_no, year, month, day, status, transacted_at FROM expense WHERE year = YEAR(#{yesterday}) AND month = MONTH(#{yesterday}) AND day = DAY(#{yesterday})
mapper.update: UPDATE expense SET status = 'VERIFIED' WHERE UPPER(TRIM(approval_no)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{approvalNo}))
